rows.query: how do I book a flight and hotel for a business trip
rows.answer:
## Booking a Flight and Hotel for Business Travel

1. **Create a Travel Profile** first (if you haven't already) at the [Self-Service Booking Tool](https://booktravel.corp.amazon.com/) — you'll need your Phone Tool email address.

2. **Book your travel** by logging into the [Self-Service Booking Tool](https://booktravel.corp.amazon.com/) and searching for flights and hotels.

**For hotels, keep in mind:**
- Book the **lowest refundable standard room rate** on a single-occupancy basis
- Book accommodations **close to your work destination**
- Use **Amazon preferred hotels** when possible for competitive rates and flexible cancellation

**Need last-minute bookings?**
- If within **6 hours of departure**, contact a [Travel Counselor](https://w.amazon.com/bin/view/TravelAndEvents/Support/) during business hours instead.

For additional guidance, refer to the [Global Travel and Expense Policy](https://policy.a2z.com/docs/176324/publication) or the [New Hire Travel Playbook](https://w.amazon.com/bin/view/TravelAndEvents/newhire_playbook/) if you're a new employee.

rows.query: can I fly business class and how much will the company pay back
rows.answer:
**You cannot expense business class travel.** Amazon only reimburses the **Lowest Logical Fare in economy/coach class**.

If you choose to upgrade to business class:
- You must **pay the full ticket cost upfront** using your own payment method
- Amazon will **only reimburse the policy-approved Lowest Logical Fare** (economy)
- You pay the **difference out of pocket**
- Upgrade fees and premium seating fees are **not reimbursable**

Note: Your manager will receive an email notification if you book a personal upgrade, but no action is required from them.
